summary: Test coverage gap for EXP-256 falsifiability module: proposal-spec listed 5 test_additions; EXP-271 added 17 assertions covering 4 of the 5 (row count, condition titles, fm-jump anchor, positional check). Missing: exactly-once assertion on ds-falsifiability-module (EXP-271 used at-least-one via includes()). EXP-277 P3 adds the missing assertion. Duplicate of EXP-256 c2 H2 / part of ISS-1696. Recommend patch via EXP-277 then close.
